hooks.command: DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; dirty=$(git -C "$DIR" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); ahead=$(git -C "$DIR" rev-list --count origin/main..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ -n "$dirty" ] || [ "${ahead:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then printf '{"systemMessage":"looptight: uncommitted or unpushed changes. Consider committing and pushing to main."}\n'; fi
